aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
aspect_ratio.info: Leave aspect ratio as 'Natural' to disable aspect ratio forcing

paragraph__1.content: General layout settings to manage spacing between content and edges of the screen. Gutter settings manage spacing between elements inside sections. Product grid gap controls gap between Product cards in product lists. [Learn more](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/general-layout)

paragraph__2.content: When enabled the main container won't exceed the content width. White space is added to the left and right side of the main content area when the window size is larger than the content width.

paragraph__1.content: Manage color schemes, badge and static color settings. [Learn more](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/colors)

static_colors.info: Static colors are not affected by the color schemes.

review_stars.label: Review stars
review_stars.info: Only affects the theme's native review stars block and product card stars when standard metafields are used for reviews.

settings.info_paragraph: Choose heading and body fonts. Set the base font size and if needed fine tune letter spacing, line height and other settings by typography type.
settings.info_header: Submenu and megamenu items use common typography settings for better consistency and hierarchy.
settings.info_font_picker: Selected font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn about system fonts](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

drawers.name: Drawers
drawers.info: Common drawer settings that are used on all drawers. Drawers are used for Main navigation, Search, Cart, Collection filtering and product pages.

modals.name: Modals
modals.info: Modals appear on top of the main content and typically user interaction before allowing them to return. Used in following sections Promotional Popup, On Demand Info, Image With Hotspots.

aesthetics.name: Aesthetics
aesthetics.info: Use aesthetics settings to make your store feel more aligned with your brand. Aesthetically store pleasing design is often perceived as design that is more usable.

enable_on_images.label: Use border radius on images
enable_on_images.info: This setting doesn't affect full screen images.

icon_stroke.label: Icon stroke size
icon_stroke.info: Adjust the stroke size of icons. Smaller value means thinner icons while larger value means thicker icons.

arrows_animations.label: Show arrows on hover
arrows_animations.info: By default the arrows will be shown. When this options is enabled slider arrows will appear when user hovers the slider.

product_card_show_rating.label: Show rating stars
product_card_show_rating.info: Only supports ratings via standard metafield definitions. Make sure your product rating/reviews app provider follows the Shopify guidelines.

product_card_quick_buy_mode.label: Quick view button mode
product_card_quick_buy_mode.info: In 'Add to cart' mode, products with multiple variants show a Quick view button for variant selection.

enable_swatches.label: Show color swatches
enable_swatches.info: Applies to product pages and cards. Configure [category metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields/category-metafields/using-category-metafields) or add custom swatches images to the files in Shopify Admin. [Get Help](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/product-card#color-swatches)

show_variant_availability.label: Show variant availability
show_variant_availability.info: Shows availability by a single variant option. By default shows "Size" availability, that can be changed through the theme translations ("card_availability_option_trigger").

custom_fields.label: Metafields to show
custom_fields.info: Show information from product metafields. Comma separated list of "namespace.key" values. Note: Use the exact same values in translations, since the namespace and key stay the same in all languages.

position_on_cards.label: Badges position
position_on_cards.info: Badges are displayed on top of the product image.

settings.info_paragraph: Use badges on product cards and on product pages. [Learn more about badges](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/product-card#product-card-badges).

custom_badges.header_info: Turn any tag into a badge. Colors for each badge can be defined separately.
custom_badges.label: Custom badge definitions
custom_badges.info: "[Product tag]:[Badge color]:[Text color];". Values separated with colon, each badge definition with a semicolon(;). Case sensitive. Colors values are optional, don't input the color values or the value separator if you don't want to use custom colors for a badge.

settings.paragraph: Cart and checkout prices always show currency codes. Example: $1.00 USD.

language_order.label: Language order
language_order.info: Comma-separated list of 2-letter language ISO codes to show first. Remaining languages follow in alphabetical order. Example: en, sv, fi

country_order.label: Country order
country_order.info: Comma-separated list of 2-letter country ISO codes to show first. Remaining countries follow in alphabetical order. Example: US, CA, GB

localization_info.label: Localization info
localization_info.info: This info is shown below the language and country selections in the localization popover and drawer menu.

show_accelerated_checkout.label: Show accelerated checkout buttons
show_accelerated_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/accelerated-checkouts)

show_cart_recommendations.label: Show recommendations
show_cart_recommendations.info: Shows product recommendations on the cart page and drawer.

cart_recommendations_type.label: Recommendations type
cart_recommendations_type.info: Link type shows a product image link, card type enables add to cart or quick view.

cart_recommendations_content.label: Recommendations content
cart_recommendations_content.info: Choose the content to display in the recommendations section. Manage content with the Shopify's Search and Discovery app.

cart_recommendations_limit.label: Recommendations limit
cart_recommendations_limit.info: The maximum number of recommendations to display.

show_cart_note.label: Show cart note
show_cart_note.info: Allows customers to leave additional details to the order

show_cart_link.label: Show cart link in drawer
show_cart_link.info: Shows 'View cart' link at the bottom of the cart drawer.

plus_minus_on_mobile.label: Show + and - controls on mobile
plus_minus_on_mobile.info: Quantity plus and minus icons are always displayed with larger screens. With this setting you can also make them visible on mobile devices.

paragraph__1.content: Free shipping notification is shown on cart when the order value is greater than the threshold. You will also need to set up matching shipping configuration in your store settings. [Get Support](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/shipping/setting-up-and-managing-your-shipping/free-shipping-rates)

paragraph__2.content: Enter minimum order value for free shipping without the currency symbol, e.g. 100. Use the store primary currency. Conversion rate is automatically calculated for any additional currencies.

free_shipping_threshold.label: Free shipping threshold
free_shipping_threshold.info: Leave blank to disable free shipping notification on cart.

favicon.label: Favicon
favicon.info: Favicon will be scaled down to 32 x 32px

search_recommendations.label: Search recommendations
search_recommendations.info: If set, show recommended terms in search. One recommendation per line.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.info: Settings for advanced users and developers that are familiar with HTML document structure.

disable_product_structured_data.label: Disable product structured data
disable_product_structured_data.info: Disables product structured data on product pages. Use this setting if you have a third party app that handles structured data.

before_after.name: Before/after image slider
before_after.info: Manage the section content through section blocks. And use the options below to change the overall style and layout of this sections. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/before-after-image-slider)

card_background.label: Card background
card_background.info: Set colors from Theme Settings in the Colors tab.

colors.foreground_gradient_info: Using Text gradient will overwrite the default text color. Remove gradient to use the default color.
colors.overlay_colors_info: These colors will be used when text and buttons are overlaid on the media.

color_scheme.label: Color scheme
color_scheme.overwrite_info: When set overwrites color schemes default value
color_scheme.overlay_colors_info: In this section, color scheme's overlay colors will be used for the text and buttons that are overlaid on the media.

heading_tag.label: HTML tag
heading_tag.info: Choose the desired HTML tag to be used in the heading. Selection affects the heading base size.

images.bg_image__info: If video is set, image is used as preview image for the video.

focal_point.label: Focal point
focal_point.info: Adjust focal point to keep the subject of the image in view.

media_toggle.label: Media toggle
media_toggle.info: Used both in mobile and desktop.
media_toggle.controls_info: If disabled, the video will be also autoplayed, looped and muted.
media_toggle.autoplay_info: If enabled, the video will be also looped and muted.

media_type.label: Media type
media_type.mixed_media_info: Mixed media option allows you to set both image and video content (not external video). Video will be used by default and image will be shown as fallback. Handy with dynamic sources.

section_height.label: Section height
section_height.pixel_height_info: Used when "Set by pixel" selected as the section height.

display_type.label: Display type
display_type.tablet_paragraph: Tablet layout uses desktop display type and margin settings.

banners.label: Banner
banners.info_products_grid: A image or video banner that is shown among the product cards.
banners.info_articles_grid: A image or video banner that is shown among the blog articles.

column_span.label: Banner column width
column_span.info: Can't exceed the amount of ites per row.

headers.custom_settings_info: Mandatory custom settings to overwrite the default appearance.

paragraphs.tablet_layout_info: Tablet layout uses the same margin values as the desktop layout.

sliders.slideshow_toggle_info: Following settings used when "Display type" is set to "Slideshow".

sliding_behavior.label: Sliding behavior
sliding_behavior.info: Select how many slides a single sliding motion covers. Used with autoplay and arrows.

slider_overflow.label: Overflow visibility
slider_overflow.info: Select how to display the items outside the slider. Effect visible on large screens.

on_demand_content.info: On demand content will be opened in a popup dialog.

required.label: Required
required.info: If enabled, the input field is required.

width.label: Width
width.info: Set the width of the input field.

text.title: Heading
text.subtitle: Subheading
text.author: Author
text.label: Label
text.label_info: Used as a label for the input field.
text.read_more: Show 'Read more' button for long text
text.read_more_info: If there is more than 250 characters in the text, only a small part of the text will be shown. The rest of the text can be toggled by clicking the 'Read more' button.

image_picker.mandatory_info: Mandatory. Used for both mobile and desktop if no mobile image is provided.
image_picker.optional_info: Optional. Used for mobile if provided. If left empty, default image is used.

video.mandatory_info: Mandatory. Used for both mobile and desktop if no mobile video is provided.
video.optional_info: Optional. Used for mobile if provided. If left empty, default video is used.

video_url.label: Video URL
video_url.mandatory_info: Mandatory. Supports Youtube & Vimeo URLs. Used for both mobile and desktop if no mobile video is provided.
video_url.optional_info: Optional. Supports Youtube & Vimeo URLs. Used for mobile if provided. If left empty, default video is used.

checkbox.show_breadcrumb_info: Use metafields to add more levels. [Learn more](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/breadcrumb)

url.label: Url
url.banner_link_info: Optional. Used for the full banner when buttons are not in use.
url.video_url__info: Supports Youtube, Vimeo and MP4 files. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/videos-and-images-in-sections)

range.grid_gap_info: Gap between items. Set to -1 to use the Theme settings Gutter value as the gap.

external_video_aspect_ratio.label: External video's aspect ratio
external_video_aspect_ratio.info: Please provide the aspect ratio used in the external videos (e.g. 16:9). Otherwise heavy cropping might occur.
external_video_aspect_ratio.info_mobile: Please provide the aspect ratio used in the external videos (e.g. 3:4). Otherwise heavy cropping might occur.

blocks.margin_info: Adjust space between this and the element above.

before_after.name: Before/after images
before_after.info: Add images to compare before and after. It's recommended to use images with the same aspect ratio.

before_image.label: Before image
before_image.info: Image to compare with the after image.

after_image.label: After image
after_image.info: Image to compare with the before image.

header_labels.heading: Label options
header_labels.info: Image labels are optional. If you don't want to use them, leave the labels empty.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.paragraph: Use up to three dedicated buttons. Note that the image's Banner link will be disabled when you use buttons.

image_or_video.name: Image or video
image_or_video.info: For best results, use landscape media for desktop and portrait media for mobile. Cropping might occur based on your section height settings.
image_or_video.info_desktop_settings: Mandatory settings. Desktop media will is used by default according to the shown media type selection.
image_or_video.info_mobile_settings: Optional settings. Mobile settings give you an option to use different content with mobile devices. Desktop settings used when left empty.

external_video.info: Don't use mixed sources for external videos. If mixed sources are used only the default video URL will be used.

additional_settings.label: Additional settings
additional_settings.info: To prevent cropping issues provide the aspect ratio used in the external videos.

hide_branding.label: Hide YouTube branding
hide_branding.info: Hides YouTube player's branding related items from view by adding overflow area to the top and bottom of the video.

the_date.label: Target datetime
the_date.info: The timer will hit zero at the target datetime. By default the online store's timezone is used. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM

post_timer_message.name: Post timer message
post_timer_message.info: This message will be shown when the timer hits zero. You can preview this by temporary disabling the "Timer datetime" block.

cross_out_unavailable.label: Cross out unavailable variants
cross_out_unavailable.info: Only works with buttons variant picker style. If enabled, unavailable variant buttons will be visually crossed out.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.info: Advanced settings for the variant picker. Use these to customize the variant picker for specific options.

dropdown_picker_options.label: Options which use the dropdown picker
dropdown_picker_options.info: Enter the variant option name(s) which use the dropdown picker (for example: 'Size'). Separate by line break.

button_picker_options.label: Options which use the button picker
button_picker_options.info: Enter the variant option name(s) which use the button picker (for example: 'Color'). Separate by line break.

size_guide.name: Size guide
size_guide.info: Size guide block adds a button for size guide popup/drawer next to the variant picker label.
size_guide.page_handle_info: Optional. If used the size guide content will be fetched from the page with the given handle. Case sensitive.

trigger.label: Option name
trigger.info: Mandatory. Determines the option name where the size guide button will be shown. Case sensitive.

inventory_transfers_enable.label: Show inventory transfer notice
inventory_transfers_enable.info: Learn how to create inventory transfers [here](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/products/inventory/transfers/create-transfer)

additional_descriptions.info_paragraph: You can provide additional information related to any inventory status.

show_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
show_dynamic_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout)

add_multipliers.label: Add multipliers
add_multipliers.info: Integer values separated with comma. Displays dedicated buttons to add multiple items to cart with a single click.

show_gift_card_recipient.label: Show recipient information form for gift cards
show_gift_card_recipient.info: Allows buyers to send gift cards on a scheduled date along with a personal message. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/add-gift-card-recipient-fields)

product_description.name: Product Description
product_description.info: The collabsible heading can be changed through default theme content

badges.name: Badges
badges.info: Show product badges on product page.

to_exclude.label: Collections to exclude
to_exclude.info: Add a comma-separated list of collection handles to exclude from list

open_as_drawer.label: Open as drawer instead of collapsible

sibling_products.name: Sibling Products
sibling_products.info: In order to use this section you will need to add required metafield definition to your online store as well as populate required product data. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/product-pages#sibling-products)

icons.name: Image Grid
icons.info: Ideal block to display different cetificates and other stamps related products. Or to display shipping or payment provider logos, etc. Supports up to 8 images.

section_header.name: Section Header
section_header.info: Use Section header block for titles and descriptions before the actual content.

sticky_buy_bar.name: Sticky Buy Bar
sticky_buy_bar.info: Sticky buy bar will appear from the bottom of the screen in view when the Buy Buttons block is not visible. Sticky buy bar's Add to cart button will add the currently selected variant into the basket.

upsell_products.name: Upsell and Complementary Products
upsell_products.info: Display desired products so that they can be added to cart with the main product of the page or separately.
upsell_products.info__2: To select complementary products, add the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

behavior_options.default: Add products with the main product

upsell_products.info__3: When using the first behavior option, "Buy Buttons" block needs to be active. With the second option, products have their own add to cart buttons.
upsell_products.info__4: Dropdown selector only works with products that have up to 250 variants. For products with more variants, quick view modal is always enforced.

attribute_insights.name: Attribute insights
attribute_insights.info: Visualize product attribute values for better user experience. [Learn more](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/product-pages#attribute-insights)

show_messages.label: Show messages
show_messages.info: Show additional messages based on the attribute value. Useful when using dynamic source for the attribute value. Only messages with content will be displayed.

below_threshold.label: Below threshold
below_threshold.info: When the value is below the threshold, Below threshold message will be displayed.

above_threshold.label: Above threshold
above_threshold.info: When the value is above the threshold, Above threshold message will be displayed.

below_threshold_message.label: Below message
below_threshold_message.info: Message shown when the value is below the Below threshold.

between_threshold_message.label: In between message
between_threshold_message.info: Message shown when the value is between the Below and Above thresholds.

above_threshold_message.label: Above message
above_threshold_message.info: Message shown when the value is above the Above threshold.

gallery.name: Gallery
gallery.info: Use this section to showcase images and videos in a masonry styled layout.

banner-grid.name: Banner grid
banner-grid.info: Use this section to highlight various content in a grid layout. Content can be managed through the section blocks. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/banner-grid)

block_aspect_ratio.label: Banner aspect ratio
block_aspect_ratio.info: Minimum aspect ratio for all the banners. Text and product banners may stretch the row's banner height beyond this setting.

blocks.media_link__info: The full banner area will work as a link regardless of the overlay content.
blocks.title_style__info: Buttons will appear as disabled if the banner link is not set.
blocks.product__paragraph: Use options below to change the appearance of the product banner. Default option refers to theme settings values.

collection-list.name: Collection list
collection-list.info: Use this section to showcase product collections in your store. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/collection-list)

use_as_subnav.label: Use as subnav
use_as_subnav.info: If enabled, the collection list will be used as a subnav. Affects styling and semantic structure. Highlights the active collection in the subnav.

custom_title.label: Custom title
custom_title.info: If left blank, the collection title will be used.

contact-form.name: Contact form
contact-form.info: Use this section to provide a contact form for your customers. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/contact-form)

email.label: Email
email.info: Email address where the form submissions will be sent. This is a mandatory block.

input.label: Custom field
input.info: Add a new custom input field to the form.

custom-liquid.name: Custom liquid
custom-liquid.info: Use this section to add custom solutions which require Liquid logic, such as quick theme changes or app inserts.

faq.name: Accordion / FAQ
faq.info: Use this section to show answers to frequently asked questions. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/collapsible-faq)

question.name: Question
question.video_info: Video will be shown with controls.

featured-article.name: Featured article
featured-article.info: Sections styling options can be found below. Don't use article that doesn't have featured image. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/featured-article)

featured-blog.name: Featured blog posts
featured-blog.info: Use this section to highlight your blog posts. You can choose to display them as a slider or a grid. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/featured-blog-posts)

featured-collection-or-products.name: Featured collection
featured-collection-or-products.info: You are able to choose between a collection or manually set product list. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/featured-collection)

collection.label: By collection
collection.info: Leave empty to use the manual products list below.

product_list.label: By manual list
product_list.info: Manually select and arrange the shown products.

featured-look.name: Featured look
featured-look.info: Showcase a featured look with a product image and a list of products. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/featured-look)

header_for_social_media.info: To display your social media accounts, link them in your theme settings.

header_for_localization_selector.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages) To add a country/region, go to your [market settings.](/admin/settings/markets)

enable_follow_on_shop_header.info: To allow customers to follow your store on the Shop app from your storefront, Shop Pay must be enabled. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/follow-on-shop)

show_top_border.label: Show top border
show_top_border.info: Shown above the Footer Block items.

show_bottom_border.label: Show bottom border
show_bottom_border.info: Shown below the Footer Block items.

image.name: Image
image.paragraph: Add custom image or SVG to the site Footer.

custom_payment_icon.name: Custom payment icon
custom_payment_icon.paragraph: Only shown when the Show payment icons option is active. Add a image or SVG code.

image.label: Image
image.info: Recommended size 76x48 pixels. Image displayed at half the pixel size.

header.name: Header
header.info: Manage header functionalities, layout and style. Setup common navigation items. Add and manage in-menu content through the section blocks. [Learn more](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/header-and-navigation)

header_for_navigation.info: Set menus for site navigation. Add megamenu content through the section blocks.

drawer_menu.label: Primary menu
drawer_menu.info: Primary menu shows first level items on desktop as shortcuts

drawer_secondary_menu.label: Secondary menu
drawer_secondary_menu.info: Secondary menu items are shown in the menu drawer.

region_menu.label: Country/Region button
region_menu.info: To add a country/region, go to your [market settings.](/admin/settings/markets)

desktop_submenu_width.label: Desktop submenu width
desktop_submenu_width.info: When set to Single column, submenu panels stay the same width as the main drawer. Megamenu columns stack vertically in single column width.

shortcut_limit.label: Top-level menu items shown on desktop
shortcut_limit.info: Hidden menu items will be shown in the drawer menu.

header_uses_icons.label: Show as icons
header_uses_icons.info: When enabled Cart, Account, and Search buttons are shown as icons instead of text

header_for_overlay_settings.info: When using overlay option the header will be displayed on top of the first section with a transparent background.

overlay_handles.label: Overlay on pages
overlay_handles.info: List of page handles. Separated by line change.

overlay_text_color.label: Overlay text color
overlay_text_color.info: You can choose the text color to be either shceme's background or foreground color to best fit the content under the header.

logo_with_background_color.label: Overlay alternative logo
logo_with_background_color.info: Optional. Used if overlay is active and "Background" value is used as the "Overlay text color". Use same image dimensions and file format as in the "Logo image".

logo_dark.label: Dark image logo
logo_dark.info: .png with transparent background recommended. Used on light background.

logo_light.label: Light image logo
logo_light.info: .png with transparent background recommended. Used on dark background.

info_paragraph.content: Add one megamenu block per top-level menu item. Match the menu link title exactly (case sensitive). [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/header-and-navigation#mega-menu)

menu_parent.label: Parent menu item title
menu_parent.info: Mandatory. Shown under this top-level menu item.

menu_columns.label: Menu columns
menu_columns.info: How many columns the menu links are split into. Add ||| before a sub-menu link title to start a new column manually (overrides this setting).

aside_width.label: Banner area width
aside_width.info: Width of the banner column beside the menu links. Use 100% when there are no menu links to show.

image_aspect_ratio.info: Applied to all banners in this megamenu.

title_style.info: Buttons appear disabled if the banner link is not set.

info_banners_paragraph.content: A banner is shown only when it has an image. Title is optional text on the image—use [br] for a line break. Link makes the whole banner clickable; button styles need a link to work.

aside_width.label: Products area width
aside_width.info: Width of the products column beside the menu links. Use 100% when there are no menu links to show.

collection.label: Select collection
collection.info: Products from this collection are shown in the megamenu.

product_list.label: Select products
product_list.info: Manually select and arrange products shown in the megamenu.

image_aspect_ratio.info: Applied to all column images in this megamenu.

title_style.info: Buttons appear disabled if the image link is not set.

info_columns_paragraph.content: Title is optional text on the image—use [br] for a line break. Link makes the whole image clickable; button styles need a link to work.

hero-countdown.name: Countdown timer
hero-countdown.info: Use the Countdown timer section to highlight current events like product and collection launches, sale campaigns, etc. Using an image with the timer is optional. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/countdown-timer)

end_date.label: Date to go
end_date.info: Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (GTM). If empty, post date content will be rendered.

hero-slideshow.name: Slideshow
hero-slideshow.info: Display a slideshow of images with optional text and buttons. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/slideshow)

hero-with-overlay-links.name: Hero with overlay links
hero-with-overlay-links.info: Manage the content through section blocks. Use the options below to change the section style and layout. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/hero-with-overlay-links)

hero.name: Hero banner
hero.info: Manage the content through section blocks. Use the options below to change the section style and layout. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/hero-banner)

image-duo-with-text.name: Image duo with text
image-duo-with-text.info: Manage the content through section blocks. Use the options below to change the overall style and layout. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/image-duo-with-text)

image.info: Use image or video side by side with your text content. Order of image blocks affects on the size of the image.

image-text-overlay.name: Image text overlay
image-text-overlay.info: Manage the content through section blocks. Use the options below to change the section style and layout. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/image-with-text-overlay)

image-with-text.name: Image with text
image-with-text.info: Manage the section content through section blocks. And use the options below to change the overall style and layout of this sections. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/image-with-text)

image-with-hotspots.name: Image with hotspots
image-with-hotspots.info: Manage the section content through section blocks. And use the options below to change the overall style and layout of this sections.

hotspot.name: Hotspot
hotspot.info: The hotspot is added on top of the image. Clicking the hotspot will display the given text and media content in a popup dialog.

image.info: Selected media will be displayed in it's natural aspect ratio.

on-demand-info.name: Feature popups
on-demand-info.info: Manage the section content through section blocks. And use the options below to change the overall style and layout of this sections.

main-article.name: Article
main-article.info: Manage the section content through section blocks.

featured_image.name: Featured image
featured_image.full_screen_info: Enabling Full screen will force the Featured image to the top.

enable_filtering.label: Show tag filters
enable_filtering.info: If blog has no tags set, then the filters will be hidden.

main-collection-banner.name: Collection header
main-collection-banner.info: Add a description or image by editing your collection. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/products/collections/collection-layout)

main-collection-product-grid.name: Product grid
main-collection-product-grid.info: Manage product grid settings and add grid banners using section blocks. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/collection-pages)

enable_swatches.label: Show color swatches in filter options
enable_swatches.info: Add custom swatch images to the files in Shopify Admin according to the swatch value. [Get Help](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/product-card#color-swatches)

main-product.name: Product
main-product.info: Manage content from blocks and general settings from these settings. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/product-pages)

custom_background_colors.label: Use custom background colors
custom_background_colors.info: Color scheme selection is used to define the base colors. In addition you can use custom background colors for different parts of the section.

variant_images.label: Variant images
variant_images.info: "Show selected" shows the chosen variant image plus images not assigned to any variant. "Show selected group" shows the chosen variant and following images until the next variant image.

desktop_info.content: Experiment with desktop layout options to find the best fit for your products.

mobile_info.content: Product media will be presented in a slider on mobile.

test_mode.label: Enable test mode
test_mode.info: If enabled, the display options be ignored and the popup will be displayed on every page load. WARNING! Only use this for testing and never on a live site.

header_for_display_options.info: If store has cookie banner enabled, the delay starts running after cookie consent was given. Theme only recognizes cookie banner that utilizes Shopify's Customer Privacy API. [Read more.](https://shopify.dev/api/consent-tracking)

delay.label: Delay
delay.info: If store has cookie banner enabled, the delay starts running after cookie consent was given. Theme only recognizes cookie banner that utilizes Shopify's Customer Privacy API. [Read more.](https://shopify.dev/api/consent-tracking)

frequency.label: Frequency
frequency.info: Delay before the popup is displayed

blocks.btn_link_info: If left blank, the button will close the popup.

newsletter.name: Newsletter
newsletter.info: Customers who subscribe will have their email address added to the 'accepts marketing' [customer list](/admin/customers?query=&accepts_marketing=1). [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/newsletter)

header_for_logo.info: Add your logo as image or SVG code.

product-recommendations.name: Product recommendations
product-recommendations.info: Dynamic recommendations use order and product information to change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/themes/development/recommended-products)

recently-viewed.name: Recently viewed products
recently-viewed.info: This section displays a list of recently viewed products. Up to total 10 products can be seen at a time. If user has no recently viewed products, this section will not be displayed.

rich-text.name: Rich text
rich-text.info: Simple text only section. Add and modify content in section blocks. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/rich-text)

sliding-text.name: Sliding text and image
sliding-text.info: Manage content and settings through fields below. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/sliding-text)

testimonials.name: Testimonials
testimonials.info: Testimonials can be managed through the section blocks. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/testimonials)

stars.label: Star rating count
stars.info: Number of stars to show in the rating. Only visible if the icon is set to Star rating.

video.name: Video
video.info: Video player allows you to add a video to an page. [Get Support](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/video)

divider.name: Divider
divider.info: Divider for added level of visual awesomeness. Choose from pre made dividers or use a custom SVG in your divider.

divider_graphics.label: Divider graphics
divider_graphics.custom_info: Advanced feature. Use custom SVG code to insert desired graphics inside the divider section.

graphics_size.graphics_height_info: When height is set to 0 the default aspect ratio of the graphic is used.

graphics_colors.info: The standard dividers are divided in three parts: Top, middle and bottom. Use different colors in different parts to achieve a fluid visual flow from section to section.

ai-section.name: AI section
ai-section.info: Create your custom section with AI. Choose "Add block" and select "Generate" to start.

presets.title: Column heading
presets.text: Use block settings to manage media, text and button content for each column. Use the section settings to change display settings for all the columns.

column.name: Column
column.info: Add media, text, and buttons to the column. All fields are optional and items with empty fields will not be displayed.

presets.title: Row heading
presets.text: Use block settings to manage media, text and button content for each row. Use the section settings to change display settings for all the rows.

row.name: Row
row.info: Add desired content to the row. It's recommended to use both media and text content for each row. If both image and video are set the video content will be used.

price-transparency.name: Price transparency
price-transparency.info: Showcase the pricing logic of your products. [Learn more.](https://themes.woolman.co/blogs/taiga/price-transparency)

icon_options.label: Icons
icon_options.info: Choose the desired icon style. Theme icons are pre-defined icons from the theme. Custom image allows you to upload a custom image for each price row.

settings.header_total_price_info: Price rows are calculated from a total price—either a product price or shop metafield.

price_product.label: Product
price_product.info: Select the product to use as the total price.

section_header.default_text: We believe you deserve to know what goes into the price of your product. We prioritize quality materials, ethical production, and thoughtful design.

price_component.name: Price row
price_component.info: Set the price of the row as a percentage of the total price.

total_row.name: Total price row
total_row.info: Optional summary row after the price rows. Only one total row per section.
